'''Hethar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a member of [[Red Hand Squadron]], holding the rank of lieutenant. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was part of a team that were to take over the workings of the [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']] after it's [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|capture]] from [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] slavers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
